---
title: "George Edward Yonge"
---

## George Edward Yonge

**Dates:** (4 July 1824-8 Dec 1904)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

He was treasurer of the county of Southampton, and son of CMY's Eton uncle.  He married (6 Oct 1859) Lucy Acland (Camberwell 1819-1902) daughter of Gideon Acland, lived at Stoke Lodge, Bishopstoke, formerly home of his elder brother James Arthur Yonge and Hannah (Rogers) Yonge, later Carey.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 4th  [1901]
- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]
- Letter from October 10, 1891[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Aug 18th [1889?]
- Letter from Oct 24th [1875][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from October 5, 1868
- Letter from Sept. 30, 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
